parameters.name: accountKey
parameters.description: Keys to the accounts you want to get transactions from

parameters.name: fromDate
parameters.description: Search fromDate date. Date is based on the date when the transaction was performed in Norwegian time.

parameters.name: toDate
parameters.description: Search toDate date. Date is based on the date when the transaction was performed in Norwegian time.

parameters.name: Transaction source
parameters.description: Source of the transactions. 'ALL' will fetch both 'RECENT' and 'HISTORIC' transactions.

parameters.name: enrichWithPaymentDetails
parameters.description: DEPRECATED: Use 'Transaction Source' to toggle this behaviour instead. 'HISTORIC' corresponds to false, and all other values corresponds to true.Indicates if an additional request should be made by the backend in order to enrich the transaction details on outgoing payments that are not booked yet and/or where the Transaction source is 'RECENT'. Please note that this might lead to increased response times and more load on the backend.

id.description: Encrypted transaction id. The id is not persistent, and may change over sessions

date.description: Date the transaction was booked. Date is in UTC and need to be parsed to timezone e.g Europe/Oslo.

typeCode.description: A code specifying kind of transaction

typeText.description: A text specifying kind of transaction

nonUniqueId.description: Can not be used alone as an ID for the transaction

interestDate.description: The interest date. Date is in UTC and need to be parsed to timezone e.g Europe/Oslo.

bookingStatus.description: Tells if the transaction is pending or booked.

canShowDetails.description: True if this transaction has details available from the details endpoint in this API

currencyAmount.description: Original amount is present if the transaction is done in another currency.

remoteAccountName.description: Name of the remote actor involved in the transaction

cleanedDescription.description: Cleaned descriptive text of the transaction

items.description:
List of errors, empty if there are none.
            - CREDIT_ACCOUNTS_FAILED: Could not retrieve transactions for some credit card accounts
            - RECENT_TRANSACTIONS_FAILED: Could not retrieve recent transactions from core banking

errors.description:
List of errors, empty if there are none.
            - CREDIT_ACCOUNTS_FAILED: Could not retrieve transactions for some credit card accounts
            - RECENT_TRANSACTIONS_FAILED: Could not retrieve recent transactions from core banking

CreditCardIdentifiersDTO.description: Identifiers used to build transaction details URL for credit card transactions. It  only be present for credit card transactions.
